creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232137
py-postorius-1.3.6.patch

Hi Dan,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-postorius to 1.3.6. The release also adds support for Django 3.2 which is the successor LTS version because Django 2.2 will become EoL in April 2022.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere -> OK (12.2-RELEASE amd64, py37, py38, py39, py310)
